mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document (kb_id, title, file_name, file_type, file_size, file_path, index_status, chunk_count, enabled, created_by) VALUES (#{kbId}, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath}, #{indexStatus}, #{chunkCount}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET title = #{title}, index_status = #{indexStatus}, index_error = #{indexError}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
